mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO employee_tab_staff_subset04(staff_id, d_code_type_0, d_code_type_1, d_code_type_2, d_string_1, d_code_type_3, d_code_type_4, d_code_type_5, d_string_0, d_code_type_6, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.staffId}, #{item.dCodeType0}, #{item.dCodeType1}, #{item.dCodeType2}, #{item.dString1}, #{item.dCodeType3}, #{item.dCodeType4}, #{item.dCodeType5}, #{item.dString0}, #{item.dCodeType6}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
